summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing for password validation and authentication fixes. All password validation requirements are working correctly, admin login with grandfathered password works, and registration flows for both individuals and organizations are functioning properly.
passed_tests: Password validation - Special character requirement enforced
Valid password acceptance for both individual and organization registration
Admin login with grandfathered password '1234' works correctly
Individual registration with valid password succeeds
Organization registration with valid password succeeds
Email verification flow with token-based links
Google OAuth endpoints for both individual and organization
Health check endpoints returning Firebase Firestore
